global.heroDescription: Crafting production-grade AI systems and highly scalable ML infrastructure. Bridging the gap between cutting-edge research and real-world deployment.
global.aboutText1: I design and build AI-powered applications using Large Language Models, Computer Vision, and modern software engineering practices. My work focuses on developing practical AI solutions, experimenting with emerging technologies, and continuously improving production-ready systems.
global.aboutText2: I believe that the future of software isn't just about writing code; it's about orchestrating intelligence. This requires a deep understanding of both distributed systems and neural architectures.
